emails.subject: Re: TDS Physical Positions
emails.body: Re: TDS Physical Positions Russ, I recieved the following message from Phillip in which you requested our physical book org codes and what Tagg book name it is associated with. Below is a list for the central desk. If you need any other info let me know. TAGG BOOK ORG REGION CODE FT-INT-CEN-MID CENTMIDSTH FT-INT-CEN-MID2 CENTMIDNTH FT-INT-CEN-MKT CENTMKTMIC FT-INT-CEN-MKT2 CENTMKTCG FT-INTRA-GULF CENTRAGULF FT-INTRA-GULF2 CEGULFNGPL FT-INTRA-ONT ONTARIO IM-SITHE SITHE FT-INT-CNT-TRAN CENTRLTRSP FT-PEOPLES PEOPLES Phillip M Love 01/25/2001 03:08 PM
